failures.description: The agent made an invalid ProductCatalogSearch invocation by supplying the wrong argument shape and type instead of the available item_id and product_id strings.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The required information was already available from step 1: item_id "1151293680" and product_id "1656367028". The agent then attempted to use ProductCatalogSearch with malformed arguments, passing only {"product_id": 0}, omitting required item_id and using an integer instead of the required string product_id. The tool explicitly returned a SchemaError stating that string product_id and item_id are required. This is not a connectivity, access, or reasoning-over-output issue.
